mapper.update: UPDATE company_item ci SET deleted = true, updated_at = now() WHERE ci.deleted = false AND ci.company_id IN (SELECT c.company_id FROM company c JOIN run_company rc ON rc.corporate_number = c.corporate_number) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM run_company_item s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN item_info i ON i.merge_key = md5(norm_text(s.value) || '|' || norm_bool(s.is_industry)) WHERE c.company_id = ci.company_id AND i.info_id = ci.info_id)

UPDATE company_patent cp SET deleted = true, updated_at = now() WHERE cp.deleted = false AND cp.company_id IN ( SELECT c.company_id FROM company c JOIN run_company rc ON rc.corporate_number = c.corporate_number ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM run_patent s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN patent p ON p.merge_key = s.merge_key WHERE c.company_id = cp.company_id AND p.patent_id = cp.patent_id )

UPDATE patent_classification pc SET deleted = true, updated_at = now() WHERE pc.deleted = false AND pc.patent_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT p.patent_id FROM run_patent s JOIN patent p ON p.merge_key = s.merge_key ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM run_classification s JOIN patent p ON p.merge_key = s.patent_merge_key JOIN classification c ON c.merge_key = s.merge_key WHERE p.patent_id = pc.patent_id AND c.classification_id = pc.classification_id )

UPDATE company_certification cc SET deleted = true, updated_at = now() WHERE cc.deleted = false AND cc.company_id IN ( SELECT c.company_id FROM company c JOIN run_company rc ON rc.corporate_number = c.corporate_number ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM run_certification s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN certification e ON e.merge_key = s.merge_key WHERE c.company_id = cc.company_id AND e.certification_id = cc.certification_id )

UPDATE company_subsidy cs SET deleted = true, updated_at = now() WHERE cs.deleted = false AND cs.company_id IN ( SELECT c.company_id FROM company c JOIN run_company rc ON rc.corporate_number = c.corporate_number ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM run_subsidy s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN subsidy e ON e.merge_key = s.merge_key WHERE c.company_id = cs.company_id AND e.subsidy_id = cs.subsidy_id )

UPDATE company_commendation cc SET deleted = true, updated_at = now() WHERE cc.deleted = false AND cc.company_id IN ( SELECT c.company_id FROM company c JOIN run_company rc ON rc.corporate_number = c.corporate_number ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM run_commendation s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN commendation e ON e.merge_key = s.merge_key WHERE c.company_id = cc.company_id AND e.commendation_id = cc.commendation_id )

UPDATE company_procurement cp SET deleted = true, updated_at = now() WHERE cp.deleted = false AND cp.company_id IN ( SELECT c.company_id FROM company c JOIN run_company rc ON rc.corporate_number = c.corporate_number ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM run_procurement s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN procurement e ON e.merge_key = s.merge_key WHERE c.company_id = cp.company_id AND e.procurement_id = cp.procurement_id )

UPDATE company_finance cf SET deleted = true, updated_at = now() WHERE cf.deleted = false AND cf.company_id IN ( SELECT c.company_id FROM company c JOIN run_company rc ON rc.corporate_number = c.corporate_number ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM run_finance s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN finance f ON f.merge_key = s.merge_key WHERE c.company_id = cf.company_id AND f.finance_id = cf.finance_id )

UPDATE finance_shareholder fs SET deleted = true, updated_at = now() WHERE fs.deleted = false AND fs.finance_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT f.finance_id FROM run_finance s JOIN finance f ON f.merge_key = s.merge_key ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM run_major_shareholder s JOIN finance f ON f.merge_key = s.finance_merge_key JOIN major_shareholder ms ON ms.merge_key = s.merge_key WHERE f.finance_id = fs.finance_id AND ms.major_shareholder_id = fs.major_shareholder_id )

UPDATE finance_management fm SET deleted = true, updated_at = now() WHERE fm.deleted = false AND fm.finance_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT f.finance_id FROM run_finance s JOIN finance f ON f.merge_key = s.merge_key ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM run_management_index s JOIN finance f ON f.merge_key = s.finance_merge_key JOIN management_index m ON m.merge_key = s.merge_key WHERE f.finance_id = fm.finance_id AND m.management_index_id = fm.management_index_id )
